calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar May-03-2012 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: 9:31am

Judge Pro Tem Elliott Myles, clerk-Julie Rumsey, nothing on record, dept. 525.
Cause called for Small Claims Appeal, Appellant, Ronald D. Artac, not present. Respondent, Leon F Artac, appears in Pro Per. Party,previously sworn, testify in the narrative and respond to questions from Judge Myles.

EXHR: Group A, 4 pages (bank Statements and promissory note.)

Evidence is retained, matter is submitted.

9:40am

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Feb-27-2012 Judgment Entered
